metadata.description: Battle spells are magical abilities that can be cast in combat using mana.

spells.title: Gust
spells.descriptor: You conjure a small blast of air.
spells.critical: Pushed within their zone

spells.title: Zap
spells.descriptor: Spark of electricity crackles from your fingertips to a foe.
spells.critical: Choose a second target within the same zone as the original target to take the same damage

spells.title: Gentle Descent
spells.descriptor: As everyone falls to their deaths, you slow their descent to one of a slow leaf.
spells.trigger: When you see creatures falling within 1 zone
spells.effect: Affected creatures fall at 1 zone per turn safely

spells.title: Lightning Bolt
spells.descriptor: You call down a bolt of lightning on your enemy.

spells.title: Thunderclap
spells.descriptor: You clap your hands to unleash a thunderous boom that deafens foes.

spells.title: Wind Wall
spells.descriptor: You conjure a wall of bustling wind.
spells.target: 1 zone border per spell tier (borders must connect) within 2 zones
spells.effect: No creature can move through the wall unless they pass a Guard defense check. Flying creatures gain +2 fortune on this check.

spells.title: Chain Lightning
spells.descriptor: You unleash lightning that arcs through multiple enemies.
spells.effect: Lightning chains to 1 nearby enemy per spell tier

spells.title: Summon Air Elemental
spells.descriptor: You summon a whirlwind of air to fight for you.
spells.effect: An air elemental appears and fights alongside you

spells.title: Tempest
spells.descriptor: You unleash a localized thunderstorm with a cyclone in the middle of it.
spells.effect: Zone becomes a tempest with severe weather effects and lightning damage

spells.title: Arcane Dart
spells.descriptor: You fire a small dart of raw magical energy.
spells.critical: 1 additional damage per your tier

spells.title: Chaos Spray
spells.descriptor: Random energy explodes from your hands.
spells.damage: 1 damage per your tier. Roll 1d6 to determine the damage type: 1) toxic, 2) fire, 3) cold, 4) lightning, 5) physical, and 6) arcane

spells.title: Arcane Barrage
spells.descriptor: You unleash numerous magical missiles.
spells.effect: You create 2 darts per spell tier

spells.title: Chaos Burst
spells.descriptor: You explode elemental magic to chaotic effect.
spells.target: All creatures in 1 zone within 3 zones
spells.damage: 3 damage per spell tier. Roll 1d6 to determine the damage type: 1) toxic, 2) fire, 3) cold, 4) lightning, 5) physical, and 6) arcane

spells.title: Nullify Magic
spells.descriptor: You attempt to destroy a magical effect.
spells.effect: Make a Spirit check vs the effect's caster to dispel it

spells.title: Summon Dragon Spirit
spells.descriptor: You summon a dragon spirit to aid you.
spells.effect: A dragon spirit appears and fights alongside you

spells.title: Arcane Hand
spells.descriptor: You create an invisible magical hand that can manipulate objects.
spells.effect: Create an invisible hand that can interact with objects and creatures within 1 zone

spells.title: Dragon Transformation
spells.descriptor: You transform into a dragon.
spells.effect: You gain dragon form with flight and breath weapon capabilities

spells.title: Erase
spells.descriptor: You remove a foe's essence from existence.

spells.title: Minor Drain
spells.descriptor: As your hand glows with dark power, you steal a foe's lifeforce.
spells.critical: Gain temporary hit points equal to damage dealt

spells.title: Wither
spells.descriptor: You decay your enemy with necrotic energy.
spells.critical: Target is vulnerable (next turn ends)

spells.title: Enfeeble
spells.descriptor: You curse a foe with necromantic energy, causing their muscles to weaken.
spells.success: Target takes -1 misfortune to attack rolls (next turn ends)

spells.title: Necrosis Field
spells.descriptor: You infuse the land with draining magic.
spells.target: All creatures in 1 zone within 3 zones
spells.effect: Creatures end turn with necrotic damage

spells.title: Summon Undead
spells.descriptor: You summon undead creatures to fight for you.
spells.effect: Undead creatures appear and fight alongside you

spells.title: Vampiric Drain
spells.descriptor: You drain a foe's life and heal yourself.
spells.effect: You gain temporary hit points equal to damage dealt

spells.title: Blood Tendril
spells.descriptor: You control blood like a weapon.

spells.title: Withering Wave
spells.descriptor: You unleash a blast of necrotic energy that saps the strength of nearby foes.

spells.title: Word of Death
spells.descriptor: You speak a word of absolute power that brings death.
spells.effect: Devastating death magic targeted against multiple foes

spells.title: Hurl Stone
spells.descriptor: You launch a small stone at a foe.
spells.critical: Target is knocked down

spells.title: Rumble
spells.descriptor: You shake the ground underneath your foes.
spells.critical: Same as success, and 1 physical damage per your tier

spells.title: Earthen Grasp
spells.descriptor: You entrap your enemy in dirt and stone until they can't move.
spells.target: 1 creature per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.critical: Target is seized (until they escape or scene ends)

spells.title: Seismic Shift
spells.descriptor: You unleash the ground below your foes to shower them with the upturned earth.
spells.target: All creatures in 1 zone within 3 zones
spells.effect: Zone becomes difficult terrain

spells.title: Shape Earth
spells.descriptor: You manipulate earth and stone.
spells.effect: Create stone formations for cover or navigation

spells.title: Stone Armor
spells.descriptor: You coat yourself in stone for protection.
spells.effect: Your Guard increases by 2

spells.title: Stone Wall
spells.descriptor: You create a wall of solid stone.
spells.target: 1 zone border per spell tier (borders must connect) within 2 zones
spells.effect: Creates impassable stone wall

spells.title: Summon Earth Elemental
spells.descriptor: You summon a golem of earth and stone.
spells.effect: An earth elemental appears and fights alongside you

spells.title: Earthquake
spells.descriptor: You cause a massive earthquake.
spells.effect: Massive terrain upheaval affecting all creatures

spells.title: Telekinetic Push
spells.descriptor: With the powers of your mind, you shove a creature away.
spells.critical: Pushed within their zone

spells.title: Visions of the Void
spells.descriptor: You open a foe's mind to the madness of the void realm.
spells.critical: Target is confused (next turn ends)

spells.title: Curse of Madness
spells.descriptor: You infuse a foe's mind with the madness of the void realm.
spells.target: 1 creature per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.critical: Confused (scene ends)

spells.title: Eldritch Tentacles
spells.descriptor: You summon strange tentacles from the void realm.
spells.target: 1 zone per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.effect: Tentacles grapple and damage creatures in affected zones

spells.title: Otherworldly Whispers
spells.descriptor: You whisper sounds from beyond to confuse your foes.
spells.effect: Affected creatures are hindered and vulnerable to psychic damage

spells.title: Twist Reality
spells.descriptor: You warp reality around you.
spells.trigger: A creature you can see uses an ability
spells.effect: Alter the outcome of the triggering ability

spells.title: Summon Aberration
spells.descriptor: You summon a creature from the void realm.
spells.effect: An aberration appears and fights alongside you

spells.title: Telekinesis
spells.descriptor: You move objects and creatures with your mind.
spells.effect: Move objects and creatures within range

spells.title: Psychic Overload
spells.descriptor: You overload a creature's mind with psychic power.
spells.effect: Devastating psychic damage and mental effects

spells.title: Disrupt Thoughts
spells.descriptor: You disturb your foe's mind.
spells.critical: Target is hindered (next turn ends)

spells.title: Induced Aggression
spells.descriptor: You encourage an ally's aggression with powerful mind magic.
spells.effect: Target gains +1 fortune to their next attack roll and deal additional damage

spells.title: Charm
spells.descriptor: You attempt to make your foes your friends.
spells.target: 1 creature per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.critical: Won't attack you (scene ends)
spells.partial: Has disadvantage on attacks against you (next turn ends)

spells.title: Command
spells.descriptor: You magically force obedience with a simple one word command.
spells.target: 1 creature per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.critical: Target uses both their action and maneuver to follow your command
spells.success: Target uses their action or maneuver to follow your one word command

spells.title: Sleep
spells.descriptor: You magically make a foe drowsy.
spells.target: 1 creature per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.critical: Falls asleep (until damaged or scene ends)
spells.success: Falls asleep (until damaged or next turn ends)

spells.title: Terrify
spells.descriptor: You magically make the creatures afraid of you.
spells.target: 1 creature per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.critical: Flees in terror (scene ends)

spells.title: Confusion
spells.descriptor: You confuse a creature's senses and thoughts.
spells.effect: Target is deeply confused about reality

spells.title: Mind Control
spells.descriptor: You completely control a creature's mind.
spells.effect: Creature follows your commands

spells.title: Majestic Presence
spells.descriptor: You project an overwhelming presence.
spells.effect: All creatures are affected by a powerful presence

spells.title: Fire Burst
spells.descriptor: Flames explode from your hands.

spells.title: Flame Bolt
spells.descriptor: You send out a ray of fire
spells.critical: Target catches fire and takes ongoing fire damage

spells.title: Blazing Arrow
spells.descriptor: You fire a fiery arrow that ignites a foe.

spells.title: Fireball
spells.descriptor: You send out a tiny ball of flame that explodes.
spells.target: All creatures in 1 zone within 3 zones

spells.title: Lava Field
spells.descriptor: You momentarily open a portal to the realm of fire as hot lava spills over the ground.
spells.target: 1 zone per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.effect: Targeted zones become difficult zones and dangerous zones (1 fire damage per spell tier)

spells.title: Set Ablaze
spells.descriptor: With a snap of your fingers, you set a foe on fire.
spells.target: 1 creature per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.critical: 3 ongoing fire damage per spell tier
spells.success: 2 ongoing fire damage per spell tier
spells.partial: 1 ongoing fire damage per spell tier

spells.title: Fire Wall
spells.descriptor: You create a wall of raging fire.
spells.target: 1 zone border per spell tier (borders must connect) within 2 zones
spells.effect: Wall deals fire damage to those who pass through

spells.title: Summon Fire Elemental
spells.descriptor: You summon a creature of pure flame.
spells.effect: A fire elemental appears and fights alongside you

spells.title: Meteor Fall
spells.descriptor: You call down meteors from the sky.
spells.effect: Massive fire and impact damage

spells.title: Astral Pressure
spells.descriptor: You double the gravity to slow your foes.
spells.critical: 1 physical damage per spell tier

spells.title: Crush
spells.descriptor: You draw gravity close to immobilize a foe.
spells.critical: Target takes additional damage and is knocked prone

spells.title: Astral Breach
spells.descriptor: You create a line of intense gravitational force that draws everything towards it.
spells.target: 1 zone border per spell tier (borders must connect) within 2 zones
spells.effect: Creatures are pulled toward the line and take damage

spells.title: Graviton Shift
spells.descriptor: You invert the gravity around a creature.
spells.target: 1 creature per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.success: The gravity effect lasts for the scene.
spells.partial: Gravity on the target flips (next turn ends)

spells.title: Pressure Wave
spells.descriptor: You manipulate gravity around you to either draw your enemies closer or push them away.

spells.title: Weight Field
spells.descriptor: You adjust the gravity in an area to speed or slow down creatures.
spells.target: 1 zone per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.effect: Zone becomes difficult or speeds creatures up

spells.title: Reverse Gravity
spells.descriptor: You turn gravity upside down in an area.
spells.target: 1 zone per spell tier within 2 zones
spells.effect: Gravity reverses, affecting movement and combat

spells.title: Singular Collapse
spells.descriptor: You concentrate the density of a foe to crush them with gravitational force.
spells.success: Target is knocked prone and pinned

spells.title: Black Hole
spells.descriptor: You create a singularity.
spells.effect: Devastating gravitational vortex

spells.title: Blessed Aegis
spells.descriptor: You shield an ally with celestial protection.
spells.effect: Target gains Guard bonus

spells.title: Sacred Fire
spells.descriptor: You burn a foe with celestial flames while blessing an ally
spells.critical: Target is vulnerable to damage (next turn ends)

spells.title: Bless Weapon
spells.descriptor: You touch a weapon to bless it with sacred energy.
spells.effect: Weapon deals additional holy damage

spells.title: Boon
spells.descriptor: You bless an ally with divine power.
spells.target: 1 creature per spell tier within your zone
spells.effect: Target gains +1 fortune to attack rolls and overcome rolls.

spells.title: Condemning Decree
spells.descriptor: You unleash divine wrath upon a foe and mark them for swift death.
spells.success: Target takes additional damage from you

spells.title: Holy Weapon
spells.descriptor: You summon a heavenly weapon.
spells.effect: Creates summoned weapon that fights for you

spells.title: Summon Angel
spells.descriptor: You summon a celestial being.
spells.effect: An angel appears and fights alongside you

spells.title: Banish
spells.descriptor: With a prayer you attempt to send a creature back to its home realm of existence.
spells.target: 1 creature (+1 creatures for each higher spell tier) within 2 zones that is not native to the current realm
spells.critical: Returned to their home realm permanently
spells.success: Returned to their home realm (overcome ends)
spells.partial: Returned to their home realm (next turn ends)

spells.title: Holy Word
spells.descriptor: You speak a divine word of absolute power.
spells.effect: Divine power affects all affected creatures
